items.headline: Who could Anthony Joshua fight in a warm-up before possible Tyson Fury clash?
items.description: Anthony Joshua needs an opponent for his next fight in order to properly prepare to face Tyson Fury. ESPN picks out six potential fights for the Brit.

items.headline: Who are Britain's current world boxing champions? Who could earn a title shot and win a belt?
items.description: Here is a list of every current world boxing champion from Britain, plus a host of names battling to be added to the group.

items.headline: Oleksandr Usyk vs. Rico Verhoeven: How to watch in UK, ring walk time, date, TV channel, undercard
items.description: ESPN has everything you need to know ahead of Oleksandr Usyk vs. Rico Verhoeven on May 23 in Egypt.

items.headline: Women's Six Nations 2026: How to watch, schedule, results, table, squads, news, TV channel
items.description: Everything you need to know about the 2026 Women's Six Nations.

items.headline: Fabio Wardley vs. Daniel Dubois: How to watch in UK, ring walk time, date, TV channel, undercard
items.description: ESPN has everything you need to know ahead of Fabio Wardley vs. Daniel Dubois on May 9.

items.headline: Arsenal and Man City's final Premier League fixtures compared as title race hots up
items.description: The Premier League title race is well and truly underway with Arsenal being chased down by Pep Guardiola's Manchester City in their hunt for a first top-flight trophy since 2004.

items.headline: Boston hosts Philadelphia with 1-0 series lead
items.description: Philadelphia 76ers (45-37, seventh in the Eastern Conference) vs. Boston Celtics (56-26, second in the Eastern Conference)

items.headline: Los Angeles hosts Houston with 1-0 series lead
items.description: Houston Rockets (52-30, fifth in the Western Conference) vs. Los Angeles Lakers (53-29, fourth in the Western Conference)

items.headline: San Antonio hosts Portland with 1-0 series lead
items.description: Portland Trail Blazers (42-40, eighth in the Western Conference) vs. San Antonio Spurs (62-20, second in the Western Conference)

items.headline: Wembanyama scores 35, most by Spur in playoff debut, in Game 1 win
items.description: Victor Wembanyama scored 35 points, the most by a Spurs player making his postseason debut, while leading a 111-98 win over the Trail Blazers in Game 1 of their first-round series Sunday night.

items.headline: Vegas Golden Knights storm back in third period, win Game 1
items.description: The Vegas Golden Knights, who have not lost in regulation since John Tortorella took over as coach last month, rallied with three third-period goals on Sunday night, defeating the Utah Mammoth 4-2 in Game 1 of their Western Conference first-round series.

items.headline: 'Duty of care' leads Dragons to part ways with Flanagan
items.description: St George Illawarra powerbrokers claim they had a "duty of care" to part ways with head coach Shane Flanagan following the club's winless start to the NRL season.

items.headline: 'Would be quite special': History beckons for Brumbies in Super Round
items.description: An historic sweep of all five New Zealand teams beckons for the ACT Brumbies as Super Round looms as the "shot in the arm" the code needs on both sides of the Tasman.

items.headline: Golden Knights rally past Mammoth 4-2 in Game 1 as Nic Dowd nets the winner
items.description: — Nic Dowd redirected Noah Hanifin's shot from the point to put Vegas ahead at 7:20 of the third period and the Golden Knights beat the Utah Mammoth 4-2 on Sunday night in Game 1 of their first-round series.

items.headline: 'We take little things out of each other's books' - Connolly on batting with Arya
items.description: Cooper Connolly, in his first season at the IPL, is Punjab Kings' highest run-getter at the moment, and has made big contributions in two of their five wins so far
